description: A hybrid machine learning framework for vehicle-specific accident risk prediction, combining historical and real-time environmental data to generate intelligent alerts for safer navigation in mountainous and high-risk road conditions.

A project focused on forecasting disaster recovery costs using historical data and socio-economic indicators. It uses machine learning to estimate costs early, with support for scenario analysis and continuous model updates.
A comprehensive framework for federated learning applied to healthcare machine learning problems.

Authored a research paper developing a methodology to integrate machine learning return forecasts into the Black-Litterman portfolio construction framework, with a full Python backtesting implementation across an 11-asset multi-asset universe (2010-2024).
Tsetlin Machine-based framework for analyzing transcriptomic crosstalk. Uses interpretable rule-based learning, enabling transparent and biologically meaningful insights beyond black-box models.

A real-time, hybrid Graph Neural Network (GNN) and machine learning framework to detect organized fraud rings and synthetic identities in mobile money ecosystems. Features a dynamic transaction graph, PyTorch Geometric, Neo4j, and a FastAPI backend
Machine Learning-driven proactive handover prediction framework for 7G Non-Terrestrial Networks(NTN).
A Hybrid Machine LearningPhysics Framework for Predicting Electronic Properties of Mg-Doped Bulk and Two-Dimensional ZnO in Data-Sparse Regimes
Machine learning framework for tsunami prediction using earthquake parameters with imbalanced learning (SMOTE)

This framework integrates large-scale NMME data and multi-platform observations to advance seasonal monsoon forecasting. This framework is developed using super-ensemble machine learning models to downscale, bias-correct, and generalize global forecasts into high-resolution regional climate intelligence for precipitation and temperature
A Hybrid Feature Selection Framework for Biomarker Identification in Cholangiocarcinoma Using Gene Expression Data and Machine Learning

Physics-informed machine learning framework to correct DFT (PBE) band gap errors using delta learning. Combines Magpie descriptors, PCA, Random Forest, and GPR to achieve ~0.55 eV RMSE, enabling accurate and scalable semiconductor materials discovery.

PhaseForge is a framework for high-throughput alloy phase diagram prediction using machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) integrated with ATAT and CALPHAD modeling. Includes tools for structure relaxation, molecular dynamics, and TDB generation.
MLFromScratch is a machine learning library written in pure Java, implementing core ML algorithms without relying on external ML frameworks.
A machine-learning framework for metabolic biomarker evaluation and cost-effective impaired fasting glucose screening: cross-continental validation across three national health surveys

Machine learning framework for estimating global Surface Water Fraction (SWF) from passive microwave brightness temperatures (WindSat/CIMR). Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.
A two-stage machine learning framework for loan default classification and loss severity prediction using Logistic Regression, Elastic Net, Ridge, PLS, Random Forest, and XGBoost.
Interpretable machine learning framework for Premier League match outcome prediction using SHAP and Streamlit.
A collection of APIs, frameworks, and platforms for scalable machine learning model inference serving, deployment, and management.
Accelera is a cutting-edge ML pipeline framework . It provides a robust, scalable solution for building and deploying machine learning workflows with optimized performance.
A Novel Fully Autonomous Machine Learning Framework for Human Free Multi Dimensional Student Assessment and Academic Performance Prediction
An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone
Machine learning framework for sarcoidosis classification using gene expression data

BioGraphX is a comprehensive framework for extracting biophysical features from protein sequences using graph-theoretical approaches. The system models proteins as interaction networks where residues form nodes and biochemical interactions form edges, enabling sophisticated feature extraction for downstream machine learning applications

A comprehensive research and educational framework for detecting model stealing attempts in machine learning systems. This project demonstrates various detection techniques, defense mechanisms, and evaluation metrics for protecting ML models from unauthorized replication.
Framework-agnostic machine learning platform for feature extraction, model inference, and predictive analytics with multi-provider support
A framework for wrapping Machine Learning projects with rest API
"Physics-informed machine learning framework for multi-objective optimisation of self-lubricating nano-coatings"

This AI framework predicts cancer survivorship using clinical healthcare data. The system trains multiple machine learning models, deploying the best performer via a hospital-style dashboard. Medical staff can input patient parameters to receive instant predictions and analytics, transforming complex clinical data into actionable insights.

Machine Learning Driven Financial Risk Assessment in Cryptocurrency Markets proposes a hybrid framework combining Hierarchical Risk Parity (HRP) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) to optimize portfolio allocation, reduce volatility, and enhance risk management in dynamic and highly uncertain crypto markets.

This project developed an automated, data-driven framework for estimating the market value of pre-owned vehicles. By moving away from subjective human appraisal, the system utilizes machine learning to provide objective and high-precision financial insights. The model analyzes over 500,000 unique records to understand complex depreciation patterns
Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.

This repository provides a machine learning framework that integrates structural and coevolutionary features to classify mutations as compensatory, offering insights into evolutionary adaptation and protein stability

This project is a Digital Twinbased predictive maintenance system that uses sensor data and machine learning to estimate the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of industrial equipment. By forecasting failures before they occur, the system enables proactive maintenance scheduling, reducing downtime, costs, and operational risks.
An Intelligent Framework for Crop Selection and Soil Nutrient Advisory Using Machine Learning

Machine Learningbased intelligent test selection framework for CI/CD pipelines. Uses commit history, test execution data, and ML models to predict and run only relevant tests to accelerate regression cycles.
SCADI Dataset: Classification of self-care problems in children with physical disabilities using ICF-CY framework and machine learning.
Quantum-Enhanced Explainable AI framework for detecting cryptomining malware in cloud environments using Machine Learning, behavioral analysis, and Streamlit dashboard visualization.
Machine learning framework for modeling brain connectivity from fNIRS/EEG signals, including optode design and graph-based analysis.
Fraud Risk Management in Banking Systems by Shavana Shaik
Polygenic risk score (PGS) and machine learning framework for primary open-angle glaucoma prediction in African ancestry cohorts.
Adaptive Image Steganography Framework using Machine Learning for edge detection and secure data hiding.

The Adaptive Multi-Task Prediction System is an intelligent, domain-independent machine learning framework designed to automate predictive analytics for multiple types of structured datasets. The main objective of this project is to simplify machine learning processes by reducing manual intervention and improving prediction transparency.
Machine Learning framework written in pure Python 3.14

Engineered a machine learning pipeline achieving 85% accuracy in predicting customer booking behavior, and a scalable demand forecasting framework supporting capacity planning across 1,500+ daily premium lounge departures at Heathrow Terminal 3.

A multi-sensor ML framework using GY-87 IMU, NEO-6M GPS & ESP8266 on an RC vehicle to classify vehicle accidents (Collision, Fall-Off, Normal Driving) with 98.84% accuracy via a Stacking Ensemble (ANN + SVM + Decision Tree + Naive Bayes). Includes ADASYN augmentation, feature engineering, and permutation importance analysis. | B.Tech CSE

Cerebrus is an intelligent malware analysis framework designed to provide multi-layered defense against modern cyber threats. It integrates static analysis, machine learning, external threat intelligence, and explainable AI (XAI) to deliver a robust platform for detecting known and unknown malware across various file formats.
A machine learning and Monte Carlo framework for scenario-based geopolitical analysis
Code for paper titled "A Machine Learning Framework for Automated Planning of Hybrid Energy Systems Using Generalizable Deep Reinforcement Learning"

TEMPO establishes a clinically grounded, mechanistic, and predictive modeling framework that integrates spatial single-cell data with systems biology and machine learning to advance precision oncology in TNBC.
A growing collection of bare-metal machine learning experiments. Building everything from single-weight optimizers to full C-based AI frameworks without external libraries

This project develops a comprehensive Machine Learning framework for predicting Peak Particle Velocity (PPV) from controlled blasting operations in Indian coal mines. It extends the traditional CMRI empirical formula with modern ML models, SHAP explainability, multi-output prediction, and a real-time safety intelligence dashboard.
Description: Geospatial analytics and machine learning framework for rural financial access analysis in Scotland.

This project aims to provide a robust, end-to-end framework for detecting financial fraud by combining traditional pattern recognition with behavioral anomaly detection. By bridging the gap between a high-performance machine learning backend and a modern observability dashboard, it offers a holistic view of transaction safety in real-time.

A hybrid machine learning framework for high-accuracy prediction of vessels Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA) in seaports, integrating Extra Trees, AutoGluon Tabular, and LightGBM with Random Forest Regressor meta-learner, utilizing AIS data from the Baltic Sea.
Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
A geospatial and machine-learning framework to analyze mangrove fragmentation typologies, trajectories, and path dependence in Southeast Asian urban landscapes.

Developed a class-level machine unlearning framework to selectively remove the influence of specific class data from trained machine learning models while preserving overall model performance, with applications in privacy, compliance, and adaptive AI systems.
Machine learning framework for predicting sodium-ion battery electrode properties
Implementation of a framework that combines comparative metrics and machine learning to evaluate OSM 3D building data quality.

A machine learning framework for predicting diabetic patient hospital readmission across three outcome classes. Covers 12 models from Logistic Regression to Stacking Classifiers, with SMOTE balancing, GridSearchCV tuning, LIME explainability, and feature importance analysis on 101,766 patient records.

Machine Learning framework for predicting binding energies and magic numbers in Cu, Ag, and Au nanoclusters (N  55) using the Open Quantum Cluster Database (OQCD). Features 7 ensemble models, SHAP interpretability, and 9 geometric descriptors.
Machine learning stock prediction framework using DecisionTree, RandomForest, XGBoost with walk-forward validation on Nifty500 stocks.

This research aims to develop and compare multiple time-series machine learning models to predict future donation trends for community food assistance programs. The core contribution is an anomaly-aware, multivariate forecasting framework that not only predicts donation volume but specifically identifies upcoming donation drought periods

AI-powered cognitive behavior analysis system for detecting thinking patterns, focus levels, mental fatigue, and overthinking behavior. Uses machine learning, clustering, and advanced visualizations to generate behavioral intelligence insights from user interaction data.
Machine Learning assignments and experiments including data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, optimization, and explainability techniques using Python and deep learning frameworks.
A unified framework for tabular, time-series, and multimodal machine learning
An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Predicting Surfactant Need and Dosage in Preterm Infants with Respiratory Distress Syndrome
dgbpy is a framework for research and deployment of machine learning models from seismic and well data.
A MACHINE LEARNING FRAMEWORK FOR CUSTOMER LIFETIME VALUE  PREDICTION IN MULTI-CATEGORY RETAIL
Hybrid LLM-based framework for automated data cleaning in Electronic Health Records (EHR), combining GPT-based contextual correction with statistical validation and machine learning evaluation.
Node.js bindings for [MLX](https://github.com/ml-explore/mlx) - Apple's array framework for machine learning on Apple Silicon.
Machine learning framework for predicting digital addiction risk among teenagers using behavioral, health, and academic data.

An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.
Multi-agent evolutionary framework for automated scientific machine learning discovery
APIs and resources for PyTorch, an open source machine learning framework for tensor computation and deep learning developed by Meta.
Machine learning-based unified framework for detecting and analyzing multiple network attack patterns using the CICIDS2017 dataset and Streamlit dashboard.
Comparative and Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Fake News Detection: A Trust Gap  and Cross-Dataset Robustness Analysis
Translation exploration with Transformers and Machine Learning Experimentation Platfroms

A growing machine learning framework built entirely from scratch in pure Python  no external libraries such as NumPy or scikit-learn.  The goal is to deeply understand how machine learning algorithms work internally by implementing them from first principles.
The AIP-G 1.0 (Alzheimers disease, Inhibitor Predictor for GSK-3, version 1.0) pipeline implements a two-stage machine learning framework for predicting GSK-3 inhibitors for Alzheimers disease.
This project leverages the high-performance computational power of NumPy alongside the scalable machine learning framework TensorFlow to build a robust end-to-end data pipeline and predictive model.
Machine Learning based Dynamic Portfolio Optimization & Backtesting Framework for Indian Equities.

Research work on False data injection attacks on Cyber Physical Systems using deep learning approaches. Novel Aprroach of Inter- and Intra machine based graph using spatio temporal model with Multi-Head Attention and used optimized Deep Q-Networks thershold.

Explainable Machine Learning framework for Multiple Sclerosis (MS) subtype classification (RRMS, SPMS, PPMS) using clinical and MRI-derived features, integrating SHAP-based interpretability and counterfactual explanations for actionable insights.

Car Purchase Prediction project using Django and Django REST Framework with Machine Learning integration. It predicts whether a customer is likely to purchase a car using REST APIs and customer input data like age and salary.

HAMAD is a novel, lightweight machine learning framework engineered for real-time network anomaly detection. Developed to bridge the gap between the high accuracy of deep learning and the strict resource constraints of IoT and edge computing environments, it addresses critical challenges in modern cybersecurity.
Framework for computing Machine Learning algorithms in Python using Dask and RAPIDS AI.
Machine learning framework for cross-sectional stock return prediction using Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, and Ridge Regression.

NeuroWeave is an interactive Cybersecurity Command Center and Adversarial Machine Learning Framework. It simulates live Projected Gradient Descent (PGD) viruses to expose the catastrophic structural vulnerabilities of Neural Networks, while analyzing the mathematical limits of Spatial Sieve defense pipelines.

High-Performance Model Deployment with Full MLOps Pipeline is a comprehensive solution for deploying and serving machine learning models in production. With support for multiple protocols, scalable cloud and edge deployment, and integrated monitoring, it provides an end-to-end framework for high-performance inference and model management.
Repository for Final Year Project regarding Machine Learning Framework for Analog Circuit Design Optimsation

Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

This study used two contrasting machine learning frameworks to explore how data coverage influences high-latitude Rs modeling and prediction: an Annual Coverage Model (ACM), trained solely on sites with full annual observational records, and a Hybrid Dataset Model (HDM), which integrated seasonally incomplete sites as well.

End-to-end machine learning project predicting referendum outcomes using real-world Swiss municipal data.   Evaluated model performance using RMSE within a Kaggle competition framework.   Demonstrates skills in data analysis, model selection, and reproducible ML workflows.

ARILS: Adversarially Robust Incremental Learning System ARILS is a novel machinelearning framework designed to secure modern networks against two of the most damaging threats facing Network Intrusion Detection Systems (NIDS):  Concept Drift and Adversarial Attacks
